member.name: M:GTA.TaskInvoker.StartPlaneMission(GTA.Vehicle,GTA.Ped,GTA.VehicleMissionType,System.Single,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.param: The cruise speed for the task.

distance (in meters) at which heli thinks it's arrived. Also used as the hover distance for
and
The Z coordinate the heli tries to maintain (i.e. 30 == 30 meters above sea level).
The height in meters that the heli will try to stay above terrain (ie 20 == always tries to stay at least 20 meters above ground).
The orientation the plane tries to be in ( 0f to 360f ). Use -1f if not bothered. -1f Should be used in 99% of the times.
